verified.name: Studio Ghibli
verified.tagline: Films, characters and places from the Studio Ghibli universe
verified.description: A tidy REST catalog of Studio Ghibli's films plus the people, species, vehicles and locations that populate them. Each film record carries titles, a synopsis, director, release year and Rotten Tomatoes score. No key needed; the project moved to Vercel after Heroku's free-tier shutdown.
verified.notes: Original Heroku host is dead; verified against the Vercel deployment.

verified.name: PHP-Noise
verified.tagline: Generate seamless noise-texture backgrounds from a color
verified.description: Feed it a hex or RGB color and it returns a procedurally generated noise-texture PNG, optionally as a base64 data URI wrapped in JSON. Useful for CSS backgrounds, placeholder art and subtle grain overlays. Fully keyless with a handful of tuning parameters.

verified.name: xColors
verified.tagline: Generate and convert colors across hex, RGB and HSL
verified.description: Ask for a random color and receive it in hex, RGB and HSL at once, or convert a color you already have between those formats. A lightweight helper for palettes, theming and design tooling. Runs keyless on a community-hosted instance after the original Heroku host retired.
verified.notes: Listed Heroku host is dead; verified against the yurace.pro deployment.

verified.name: CoinGecko
verified.tagline: Crypto prices, market data and coin metadata, keyless
verified.description: One of the broadest public crypto data feeds: live prices, market caps, historical charts and per-coin developer and social stats across thousands of assets. The sample simply asks Bitcoin's price in USD. Keyless calls still work, though CoinGecko now nudges you toward a free Demo key for steadier limits.
verified.freeTier: Free public endpoints; Demo API key recommended for higher limits
verified.rateLimit: Public tier is throttled (exact keyless limit not published)

verified.name: Frankfurter
verified.tagline: Free ECB exchange rates, conversion and time series
verified.description: Serves foreign-exchange reference rates published by the European Central Bank, with endpoints for the latest rates, historical dates and time series. No key and no signup — just name a base and target currency. Open-source and refreshed on the ECB's working-day schedule.
verified.dataLicense: ECB reference rates (public); API is open-source

verified.name: VATComply.com
verified.tagline: Exchange rates, geolocation and EU VAT number checks
verified.description: Bundles ECB-sourced currency rates with IP geolocation and EU VAT number validation behind one keyless API. The sampled endpoint returns current rates based on the euro. Handy for invoicing and checkout flows that need lightweight tax and FX helpers.

verified.name: DownStatus
verified.tagline: Real-time up/down status for 90+ popular services
verified.description: A keyless JSON feed reporting whether services like Discord, GitHub and Cloudflare are operational, degraded or down, aggregated from user reports. Query one service by slug, list every tracked service, or pull ongoing outages. Each record carries recent report counts and a link to the human-readable status page.
